name: Develop Global Limited
analysis: DVP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$6.7800. Trade idea: entry A$7.5100, stop A$5.6727, target A$13.0219 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
